title: PREGNANCY AND SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: HOPE PREGNANCY CLINIC PREGNANCY AND SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based medical clinic that provides information, support, and referrals for medical and community resources. Offers urine pregnancy tests and limited confirmation ultrasounds. Parenting classes available. 2630 Market Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Expectant families and new parents Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 364-2464 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 364-2464 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Wednesday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On bus 2 route nearest stops B and H. Head west on Market. Services: Pregnancy Testing Pro-Life Pregnancy Counseling Ultrasound Scanning If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOPE PREGNANCY CLINIC
